dismissalText.commentary: Phil Salt c †Jurel b Archer 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: a brute of a delivery, and Salt is outta here! This is an absolute snorter and Salt has no idea on how to react. On middle stump and this keeps climbing through. Salt cannot get out of the way and the ball pings near the handle of the bat. Simple catch for Jurel, and RCB have been stunned early!

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli b Ravi Bishnoi 32 (16b 7x4 0x6 26m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: Bishnoi does Kohli all ends up, and Kohli has to walk! Beautifully-disguised googly, on a length just outside off. Dips on Kohli late and he is nowhere to the pitch of the ball as he looks to go inside-out. The ball rips in, goes past Kohli's flailing blade and crashes into the stumps. Bishnoi holds his arms aloft, and why shouldn't he. He has deceived Kohli completely here!

dismissalText.commentary: Devdutt Padikkal c Hetmyer b Archer 14 (7b 3x4 0x6 15m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: in the air, and Hetmyer redeems himself! Hard length on middle and leg. Sticks in the surface and Padikkal, trying to pick it up, shanks it a mile up. Hetmyer, initially running in from deep square, holds his position and has to then lunge forward at the last moment. Does so with aplomb, and Archer, after taking a bit of tap, has his second!

dismissalText.commentary: Rajat Patidar c Ferreira b Sandeep Sharma 63 (40b 4x4 4x6 67m) SR: 157.5

dismissalComment.html: Sandeep induces the miscue, and Patidar departs! Zipped in full on leg, and this seems to just stick in the surface slightly. Patidar a shade early into his slog and the ball skews up off the bottom part of the blade. Only gets the elevation he wants and Ferreira does the rest at deep mid wicket. A stunning knock, although someone else will now have to take RCB past 200!

dismissalText.commentary: Krunal Pandya c Hetmyer b Ravi Bishnoi 1 (6b 0x4 0x6 7m) SR: 16.66

dismissalComment.html: Hetmyer lunges forward, and he gobbles up another sharp grab! Given a hint of air just outside off. Krunal takes a step down and tries to go over long off. Slices across it, though, and does not get the elevation he wants. Arrows it flat to long off, where Hetmyer tumbles forward and takes it well above the turf. Bishnoi has two, and RCB four down now!

dismissalText.commentary: Jitesh Sharma lbw b Brijesh Sharma 5 (8b 0x4 0x6 8m) SR: 62.5

dismissalComment.html: rapped on the pad, and on your way, says the ump! Jitesh chats to his skipper and then opts against the review. Back of a length on middle, and this nips in a touch. Keeps a tad low too and Jitesh cannot get his bat down in time. Pinned right in front and this seems like a good decision to not review. RCB five down now!

dismissalText.commentary: Romario Shepherd c Brijesh Sharma b Jadeja 22 (11b 2x4 1x6 11m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: oh, this goes way up, touches the moon, and is taken on the second attempt! Pushed in on a length just outside leg. Stops in the surface, though, and Shepherd makes a meal of his swipe. The ball goes straight up off the top edge and Brijesh, stood at short fine leg, reacts in time to catch the bobble, having spilled the chance at the first time of asking. RCB seven down now!
